subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the Word of God to the Kingdom of God! Turn with the whole of thy being to God, forget aught else save God
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @being a source of light; guidance, @high station of the true believer, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
